title: Pinterest V2 Quality Gate

hook_strength.description: Does the headline make you stop scrolling? Is it specific, urgent, or surprising?

visual_attractiveness.description: Does it look premium fintech, not AI-generated slop? Clean, modern, trustworthy?

mobile_readability.description: Is text readable at 200px wide on phone? Font sizes adequate? Contrast sufficient?

usefulness_saveability.description: Would someone save this pin? Does it teach, warn, compare, or calculate something useful?

destination_match.description: Does the pin's promise match what the landing page delivers? No bait-and-switch.

keyword_title_quality.description: Primary keyword near beginning? Title 40-80 chars? No clickbait?

cta_clarity.description: Clear action? User knows what clicking gives them? CTA specific and benefit-driven?

hard_fail_rules: Destination page is noindexed, 404, or redirects
Generic stock photo or AI-generated people
Multiple competing ideas on one pin
quality_diminishing_rules: Generic 'free calculator' CTA instead of specific action (-5)
Keyword not in first 5 words of title (-3)
Overly similar to previous day's pin (-5)
Formula-slug in visible URL or title (-5)
